memoryArtifacts.headline: Essex England 1550 era
memoryArtifacts.description:
number in red on the map
1. "The Ray" Farmlands of Raynalde Marvin Sr on this (then) peninsula in 1554
2. Location of his house in Wrabness, bequeath to his eldest son Edward, father of Matthew and Reinhold Marvin. 
3. "Ramsey Street"
4. Ramsey Bridge shown by the lines crossing the river. 
5. Estate and home of Reinhold Marvin, the younger, was in this vicinity. 
6. Parish were Matthew and Reinold Marvin were Christen and the father died. 
7. Parish were their elder brother, Edward died.

zh.lifeSummary: Johanna於1519年出生在英國艾可拉姆齊。她於1544年10月24日與Rynalde Mervyn在英國艾可拉姆齊結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1561年10月14日在她的家鄉享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johanna于1519年出生在英国艾可拉姆齊。她于1544年10月24日与Rynalde Mervyn在英国艾可拉姆齊结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1561年10月14日在她的家乡享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可拉姆齊。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Johanna was born in 1519, in Ramsey, Essex, England. She married Rynalde Mervyn on 24 October 1544, in Ramsey, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 14 October 1561, in her hometown, at the age of 42, and was buried in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Johanna est née en 1519, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Rynalde Mervyn le 24 octobre 1544, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 octobre 1561, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Johanna wurde 1519 in Ramsey, Essex, England geboren. Sie hat am 24. Oktober 1544 in Ramsey, Essex, England Rynalde Mervyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Oktober 1561 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Johanna è nata il nel 1519 nel Ramsey, Essex, England. Lei sposato Rynalde Mervyn il 24 ottobre 1544, nel Ramsey, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 ottobre 1561, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Ramsey, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannaは1519年にイギリスエセックスラムセイで生まれた。1544年10月24日にイギリスエセックスラムセイでRynalde Mervynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1561年10月14日に故郷で42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna(은)는 1519년 영국 에세스 램지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1544년 10월 24일 영국 에세스 램지에서 Rynalde Mervyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 10월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johanna nasceu em 1519, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Rynalde Mervyn em 24 de outubro de 1544, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1561, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Johanna родилась в 1519 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rynalde Mervyn 24 октября 1544 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 октября 1561 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Johanna nació en 1519, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Se casó con Rynalde Mervyn el 24 de octubre de 1544, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1561, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
